name: dentist_appointment_02

input.subject: Reminder: Dental Appointment Tomorrow
input.snippet: This is a reminder of your upcoming dental appointment...
input.body_text:
Hello,

This is a friendly reminder of your upcoming dental appointment:

APPOINTMENT DETAILS
-------------------
Patient: John Doe
Service: Routine Cleaning & Exam
Date: Tuesday, February 10, 2026
Time: 2:00 PM

Dentist: Dr. Michael Chen, DDS

Bright Smile Dental
250 First Street, Suite 100
San Francisco, CA 94105
Phone: (415) 555-9876

If you need to reschedule, please reply to this email or call us.

We look forward to seeing you!

Bright Smile Dental Team
